blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Local /webhook accepted async lineage but terminalized failed with runtime error "dependencies.discoveryMemoryStore.writeExploitOutcome is not a function", and public relay POST /webhook remained unavailable (ERR_NGROK_3200).

appliedUpdates.description: Added curl flow guidance that discoveryProfile intent fields must be string-shaped contract values (array-shaped intent fields are rejected).
